headline: LITE Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Shares Drop
summary: Lumentum's Q3 FY26 EPS beat estimates, revenues rise 90% on surging cloud & AI demand; 1.6T transceiver shipments are set to ramp in fiscal Q4.

headline: Keysight And CATARC Tie EV Charging Standards To Future Growth Potential
summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) has expanded its collaboration with China's China Automotive Technology and Research Center (CATARC). The two parties have set up a Joint Innovation Laboratory focused on new energy vehicle charging test technology, standards work, and certification. This move deepens Keysight's role in the electric vehicle charging ecosystem and formalizes its involvement in global EV charging standards. Keysight Technologies, trading at $366.68, is already closely linked...
